## 🔖 Type of change

<!-- Check all that apply -->

- [ ] 🐛 **Bug fix** — something was broken, now it's not
- [ ] ✨ **New feature** — net new behaviour
- [ ] 🔌 **New adapter** — adds a new AI provider
- [ ] 🤖 **New agent role** — adds a new agent type
- [ ] 🎨 **UI improvement** — dashboard change
- [ ] ♻️ **Refactor** — same behaviour, cleaner code
- [ ] 📝 **Docs** — README, comments, guides
- [ ] 🔒 **Security fix**
- [ ] 💥 **Breaking change** — existing behaviour changes

## 📋 Reviewer checklist

<!-- For the reviewer, not the author -->

- [ ] Code is clear and follows the project style
- [ ] No secrets, keys, or `.env` values hardcoded
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes on this branch
- [ ] UI changes look good on a dark background
- [ ] Breaking changes are documented
